about.title: About Me
about.body: I'm a developer building things on the web. Passionate about clean code and minimalist design. I enjoy turning complex problems into simple, beautiful, and intuitive solutions.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.body: Working on various open-source projects and personal experiments. From low-level systems to high-level UI components, I love exploring the full stack.

socials.title: Connect with Me
socials.body: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions. Find me on GitHub, Twitter, or LinkedIn.
